mapper.select: select book.id, book.book_name, author.author_name, book.cover_url, book.publish_date, book.create_time from tb_book book join tb_author author on book.author_id = author.id where book.is_delete = 0 order by book.create_time desc limit 3

SELECT book.id, book.book_name, author.author_name, publisher.publisher_name, category.category_name, book.isbn, book.bookshelf, book.cover_url, book.publish_date FROM tb_book book JOIN tb_author author ON book.author_id = author.id JOIN tb_publisher publisher ON book.publisher_id = publisher.id JOIN tb_category category ON book.category_id = category.id WHERE book.is_delete = 0

select book.id, book.book_name, publisher.publisher_name, author.author_name, book.introduction, book.publish_date, book.isbn, book.cover_url from tb_book book join tb_author author on book.author_id = author.id join tb_publisher publisher on book.publisher_id = publisher.id where book.id = #{bookId} and book.is_delete = 0

SELECT book.id, book.book_name, author.author_name, publisher.publisher_name, category.category_name, book.isbn, book.bookshelf, book.cover_url, book.publish_date FROM tb_book book JOIN tb_author author ON book.author_id = author.id JOIN tb_publisher publisher ON book.publisher_id = publisher.id JOIN tb_category category ON book.category_id = category.id WHERE book.id = #{bookId} and book.is_delete = 0

SELECT b.id AS id, b.book_name AS bookName, a.author_name AS authorName, p.publisher_name AS publisherName,b.isbn AS isbn, b.cover_url AS coverUrl, b.publish_date AS publishDate, b.is_delete AS isDelete FROM tb_book b LEFT JOIN tb_author a ON b.author_id = a.id LEFT JOIN tb_publisher p ON b.publisher_id = p.id WHERE b.is_delete = 0 LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
